name: Sabzi Koofteh
recipeIngredient: Large handful of fresh mint leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice and split peas separately in a pan with about ½ to ¾ cup each (not too much water) for 5-10 minutes.
2. Chop onion, mint, and watercress together.
3. Add about ½ teaspoon salt and ¼ to ½ teaspoon turmeric to the rice mixture, then add the chopped onion mixture and mix with the meat.
4. Beat the egg and stir it in well.
5. In another pan, sauté about half a medium onion until tender, adding a little butter and about 3 tablespoons tomato paste.
6. Add ½ teaspoon turmeric, salt (½ teaspoon), and water (about half a saucepan). Bring to a boil.
7. Form palm-sized meatballs from the mixture and place them in the boiling mixture.
8. Cook for approximately 1/2 hour.
9. Serve hot in bowls with broth. Yogurt and pickles on the side.
